title: Review output from a single Sonnet review subagent

file.description: Repo-relative path of the reviewed doc.

summary.description: 2-3 sentences describing the doc and overall health. Used by the gate and by humans to spot-check review quality.

findings.description: Zero or more findings. An empty array is a valid result.

location.description: Human-readable location, e.g. 'line 42' or 'section: Working method' or 'lines 100-110'.

evidence.description: Doc claims X; reality (verified via Y) is Z.

verification.description: Shell command or file-read instruction the fix agent can re-run to confirm the issue and (after fix) confirm resolution.

fix_sketch.description: What to change, in terms a fix agent can execute against the current source.

risk.description: What could go wrong if applied without care. Empty string if trivial.
